heading: Complete your <bold>Global Nature Watch</bold> user profile
subheading: We use this information to make Global Nature Watch more useful to you. This tool is experimental, and knowing you better helps us improve. Features may change or be removed over time.

fields.preferredLanguageHelper: Please note most of our communications are in English.
fields.topics: What topic(s) are you most interested in?

consent.essentialEmails: By creating an account, you agree to receive essential emails about your Global Nature Watch account and system updates. You can unsubscribe from non-essential emails at any time.
consent.newsEmails: Send me news, resources, and opportunities from Land & Carbon Lab.
consent.testFeatures: Contact me about testing new features.
consent.termsAccept: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Use</termsLink> and <aiTermsLink>Global Nature Watch AI Terms of Use</aiTermsLink>, and I acknowledge the privacy practices described in the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and the <aiPrivacyLink>Global Nature Watch AI Privacy Policy</aiPrivacyLink>.

errors.profileNotVerified: We saved your profile, but it's not verified yet.
errors.profileNotVerifiedDescription: Please wait a moment and try Continue again. Your profile status is updating.
